message:
Make NatsClient::close() async with graceful flush before shutdown

Convert close() from sync to async to allow flushing pending writes
before shutting down the TCP stream. This ensures buffered UNSUB or
PUB commands are delivered to the server before the connection drops,
preventing message loss on orderly shutdown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
